_note: Deploy with --vcluster. DEV path (namespaces + deploy to dev) is testable. The Kyverno steps (policy present, PROD deploy blocked) REQUIRE Kyverno, which is NOT installed on this CRC (nor in the vcluster) — those checks are EXPECTED TO FAIL here; they pass on the real DCS platform where PROD namespaces enforce Kyverno.

steps.run: envsubst < hello-dcs.yaml | oc apply -n team-dev -f - && oc wait --for=condition=available deployment/hello-dcs -n team-dev --timeout=180s
oc apply -f kyverno-policy.yaml || echo 'kyverno CRD absent (expected on CRC)'
envsubst < hello-dcs.yaml | oc apply -n team-prod -f - || true

envsubst < hello-dcs.yaml | oc apply -n team-prod -f - && oc label deployment/hello-dcs -n team-prod data-classification=internal --overwrite && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs -n team-prod --timeout=180s
